title: clamp()
description: Sets a value that scales fluidly between a minimum and maximum. Write one line instead of multiple media query breakpoints. Works for font-size, width, padding — anything numeric.
html:
Build Better Layouts With Less Code

Resize the preview or change the font-size value to see clamp() in action.
challenge: Replace the fixed `font-size` on `.headline` with `clamp(1rem, 5vw, 2.5rem)` to make it scale fluidly — never smaller than 1rem, never larger than 2.5rem.
